items.title: 可持续开发仓库基础
items.scope: 父 POM、Makefile、CI、Docker Compose、库存、源码模块和门禁。
currentEvidence: make ci passed on 2026-06-15 after commit d13b817
nextActions: 每提升一个后端源码模块继续补测试和模块级门禁。

items.title: 当前内容迁移
items.scope: 把 Windows 交付包中可恢复的前端、后端、部署、SQL 和文档资产迁入新仓库。
currentEvidence: current content inventory is tracked and checked by make inventory-check
blockingIssues: 业务动作级源码、页面、表关系仍需继续排查，不能视为完整 MES 产品形态已迁移。
nextActions: 后续业务包进入时先跑 module-intake-check，再补 smoke 和落库验收。

items.title: Oracle 替换为 PostgreSQL 默认路径
items.scope: 默认运行、默认构建和默认 Docker 路径使用 PostgreSQL；Oracle 仅作为 legacy 对照。
currentEvidence: oracle replacement check is part of make ci
mapper PostgreSQL audit currently reports 0 errors and 3 warnings
auth_user lock/unlock PostgreSQL gap is covered by deploy/docker/postgres/init/073-auth-user-lock-status-compat.sql and make acceptance-auth-user-persistence
blockingIssues: Oracle backlog still contains tracked references and recovered modules with direct Oracle dependencies.
nextActions: 逐模块把 Oracle SQL、ojdbc 和方言差异迁移到 PostgreSQL 或保留在显式 legacy 路径。

items.title: 项目目标与交接说明
items.scope: 项目目标、可持续开发说明、验收规则和接手入口。
currentEvidence: required docs are checked by scripts/verify-sustainable-repo.py
nextActions: 随着真实验收继续更新目标状态。

items.title: 后端落表排查交接入口
items.scope: 为后续专门线程准备表级业务含义排查入口。
currentEvidence: backend table audit index and persistence acceptance report exist
nextActions: 专门线程继续补页面/API/Service/Mapper/表/字段业务含义地图。

items.title: 平台登录/认证
items.scope: 登录、current user、基础平台 API smoke。

items.title: 用户/人员/岗位/公司/组管理
items.scope: 用户、人员、岗位、公司、组管理页面和 CRUD 落库验收。
currentEvidence: organization department CRUD has marker PostgreSQL evidence
organization group CRUD has marker PostgreSQL evidence
organization position CRUD has marker PostgreSQL evidence
organization company CRUD has marker PostgreSQL evidence
organization person CRUD has marker PostgreSQL evidence
organization person createUser=true has marker PostgreSQL evidence for org_person/auth_user binding, update synchronization, and soft delete
independent auth user create/update/lock/unlock/delete has marker PostgreSQL evidence for auth_user, org_person binding, and auth_user_role cleanup
blockingIssues: 用户授权和权限配置页面的新增/编辑/删除落库验收仍未补齐。
nextActions: 用真实前端执行用户授权和权限配置页面动作，记录 API、后端入口和 PostgreSQL 查询。

items.scope: 组织管理页面、部门 CRUD、组织关联人员/岗位/公司等。

group create/update/delete passed with marker ADP_E2E_20260615133645_GRP
position create/update/delete passed with marker ADP_E2E_20260615134928_POS
company create/update/delete passed with marker ADP_E2E_20260615141009_COM
person create/update/delete passed with marker ADP_E2E_20260615142411_PER

items.title: 生产模块完整功能

生产创建、状态流转、报工、备料、退料等写动作没有 PostgreSQL before/after 证据。

items.title: PostgreSQL 缺口进入幂等 SQL/backlog
items.scope: 每个缺表、缺列、类型不兼容和 Oracle 方言残留进入 init SQL 或 backlog。
currentEvidence: oracle audit, postgres migration inventory, oracle replacement status and mapper audit are part of make ci

nextActions: 每发现新 PostgreSQL 缺口，追加幂等 SQL 或模块 backlog，并重新跑 inventory/audit。
